general.title: General Settings
general.presetHint: Preset is injected into all Agent prompts, affecting LLM perspective and output style; Output Language forces the final output language.
general.languageHint: Application Language controls UI; Output Language controls KC final output; Prompt Language is locked to English (best LLM performance).
general.outputLanguageHint: Language used by all Agents when generating Knowledge Cards
general.outputLanguageAutoHint: Default: detect input language and follow (v2.0 compatible)
general.outputLanguageZhHint: Force Chinese output (even if input is English)
general.promptLanguageHint: Prompt is always in English (best LLM performance with English prompts), not modifiable
general.autoTranslateHint: When enabled, responses from Explain / Chat / Compare modules are automatically translated to Application Language
general.resetConfirm: Reset to default settings? Preset=Academic, Output Language=Auto.
general.savedDetail: Preferences saved, will take effect on next generation
general.promptArchitectureDesc: System (read-only built-in) → Preset Persona (selected here) → Project (Prompt Tab) → User (one-shot extension)

provider.title: Provider Configuration
provider.savedDetail: Configuration saved, will take effect on next generation
provider.resetConfirm: Clear saved Provider configuration? Will fall back to .env.local environment variables.
provider.presetHint: Selecting a preset auto-fills Base URL + default Model
provider.apiKeyHint: Stored in browser localStorage and cookie, never uploaded to server
provider.modelHint: Model name (must match Provider supported models)
provider.temperatureHint: Low (0-0.5) stable output, high (0.7-1.5) more creative. Current: {value}
provider.errorFieldsRequired: Please complete: Base URL / API Key / Model

prompt.title: Prompt Extension
prompt.projectExtensionHint: Append this text to all Agent prompts (affects all calls)
prompt.playgroundHint: Debug single Agent calls without affecting production Pipeline
prompt.agentReflection: Reflection and quality assessment of generated output
prompt.agentReplan: Re-plans execution steps after reflection failure
prompt.agentKnowledgeBuilder: Aggregates all Agent outputs into final Knowledge Card
prompt.clearAllConfirm: Clear extension config for ALL agents? This cannot be undone.
prompt.architectureHint: Project Extension is appended to the Agent's prompt and affects all calls; User Extension is a one-shot override.
prompt.appendPlaceholder: Instructions appended to this Agent's prompt (e.g., cite paper page numbers / limit terms to < 15 / use LaTeX formulas)…
prompt.appendHint: Supports multi-line, appended verbatim to the Agent's system prompt; empty means no append.
prompt.outputPlaceholder: Constraints on this Agent's output (e.g., max 3 sentences per paragraph / glossary must be alphabetically sorted)…
prompt.outputHint: Affects Agent output format and style; empty means default style.
prompt.savedDetail: ✓ {agent} extension saved, takes effect on next call

cost.title: Cost & Token Dashboard
cost.clearConfirm: Clear all history? This cannot be undone.
cost.emptyHint: Generate a Knowledge Card on the home page — token and cost stats will appear here.

about.title: About ResearchKit OS
about.description: AI Research Operating System — Multi-agent paper reading & knowledge management
about.missionDesc: Turn any research paper into structured, shareable Knowledge Cards — multiple AI Agents work together to deliver takeaway / terminology graph / recommended reading / Markdown / Obsidian / Knowledge Graph in 2 minutes.
about.techLLMDesc: OpenAI Compatible API (DeepSeek / OpenAI / OpenRouter / Groq / SiliconFlow / Custom)
